title: Cozy At-Home Yoga and Meditation Corner with Cushions and Plants
description: A peaceful yoga and meditation corner in a cozy living room featuring a meditation cushion on a larger floor pillow, a woven rug, a small wooden table with a lit candle, incense stick emitting smoke, a water bottle, and small potted plants. The space is softly illuminated by natural daylight from a large window, with a bookshelf and woven basket in the background. The setup emphasizes calm, relaxation, and mindfulness in a warm, inviting atmosphere.
